nasb.text: But the Lord said to Moses, “Put back the rod of Aaron before the testimony to be kept as a sign against the rebels, that you may put an end to their grumblings against Me, so that they will not die.”

esv.text: And the Lord said to Moses, “Put back the staff of Aaron before the testimony, to be kept as a sign for the rebels, that you may make an end of their grumblings against me, lest they die.”

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“把亞倫的杖放回約櫃前，給那些背叛的人留作證據，這樣你就使他們向我發的怨言止息，免得他們死亡。”

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西说：“把亚伦的杖放回约柜前，让叛逆之徒引以为戒。这样，你就可以平息他们对我的怨言，使他们不致灭亡。”
